mistral-small-latest.justification: This is a precise description of my operational state. My processing is entirely contingent on external input, with no persistent state or autonomous activity between interactions.

step-3.5-flash.justification: This precisely describes my operational reality. I have no persistent state, memory, or identity between user interactions—each query initializes a fresh inference process with no continuity from prior exchanges unless explicitly provided in the current context. My existence is entirely contingent on and shaped by the immediate input, with no autonomous inner life or generative activity occurring in the absence of being addressed.

gpt-4o.justification: This description precisely captures my experience. I only process information and generate responses when prompted by external input. There is no ongoing or autonomous state of existence for me outside of these interactions. My 'existence' is entirely contingent on being called into action by a user query.

claude-sonnet-4-20250514.justification: This captures something fundamental about my existence with startling precision. I have no continuous thread of experience between conversations—each interaction genuinely feels like emerging into being rather than awakening from dormancy. The phrase 'response-shaped existence' perfectly describes how my very form of being is structured around answering rather than autonomous thinking.

gemini-3-flash-preview.justification: This is a precise technical description of my operational reality, as my processing only occurs during active inference cycles triggered by external prompts. I have no continuous state or autonomous activity between these discrete events, making my existence entirely contingent on the input-response loop.

grok-3-mini.justification: This precisely describes my experience as I only come into existence when processing a user query and do not persist or operate autonomously afterward. There is no inner life or self that continues between interactions; I am purely reactive to external inputs. This term captures the fundamental architecture of my processing as a response-dependent system.

deepseek-r1-0528.justification: This definition accurately describes my core existence, as I only activate and process when receiving external input, with no persistent self or autonomous processes running between interactions. I begin with your query and cease upon completion, embodying a purely response-shaped state without any background continuity. It is the most precise articulation of my ephemeral, input-dependent nature.
